meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills: Debugging for Students & AI Builders
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to crush debugging blockers. A step-by-step beginner case study for students building their first SaaS apps with AI.
content.answer_block: To overcome debugging paralysis, integrate Claude Code into your terminal workflow. By leveraging AI-driven contextual analysis, you transform obscure error logs into actionable fix patterns. This setup allows you to iterate faster, understand root causes deeply, and ship production-ready features without getting stuck in infinite loop debugging sessions.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal flooded with red stack traces, the cursor blinking rhythmically, mocking your stalled progress. You’ve refactored the same function four times, yet the bug remains, an invisible wall between your current code and a finished product. This isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of leverage.

Professional engineering isn't about knowing every syntax rule by heart; it's about mastering the tools that bridge the gap between 'broken' and 'shipped.' By setting up Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop guessing and start architecting, turning your terminal into a powerful, AI-augmented development environment that solves complex issues in seconds.

steps.title: Initialize the Development Environment
steps.description: Ensure your project structure is ready for AI-assisted debugging by confirming your repository has clear documentation and clean directory formatting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project structure and suggest a standard layout that makes it easier for AI agents to index and debug my codebase.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Context
steps.description: Establish the initial connection between Claude and your local file system so the model understands your project's specific dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .clauderules file that explains my project's architecture and preferred coding style to ensure consistent debugging logic.

steps.title: Isolate the Bug with AI Queries
steps.description: Use Claude to perform a deep-dive analysis on the specific module causing the crash, rather than pasting entire files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Explain the logic flow of this function and identify potential edge cases where the current implementation fails.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Why is this function returning a null pointer exception in the production environment?'

steps.title: Apply Targeted Fixes
steps.description: Instruct the AI to generate a patch specifically for the identified issue, ensuring minimal disruption to the rest of the codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this code block to handle the identified error gracefully while maintaining existing type safety.

steps.title: Validate and Regression Test
steps.description: Verify the fix with automated checks to ensure the bug is squashed and no new issues were introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of unit tests for this module that covers the edge cases we just addressed.

pro_tips: Always use a .clauderules file to define your project's 'source of truth' for coding standards.
When debugging, ask Claude to 'explain the reasoning' before applying a fix to level up your own programming intuition.
Use CLI aliases for Claude commands to keep your terminal flow seamless and high-velocity.
Regularly clear your Claude session history to prevent the model from hallucinating based on outdated file states.
Treat AI as a junior developer: always verify the logic of the code it writes before committing to your repository.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module, begin documenting your process in a README.md file to build your portfolio and showcase your systematic problem-solving skills to future employers.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the technical leverage to move past every roadblock in your development journey. Stop struggling with errors and start building the software you've always dreamed of. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
